title: ratsach #7523
definition:
1) to murder, slay, kill
    1a) (Qal) to murder, slay
        1a1) premeditated
        1a2) accidental
        1a3) as avenger
        1a4) slayer (intentional) (participle)
    1b) (Niphal) to be slain
    1c) (Piel)
        1c1) to murder, assassinate
        1c2) murderer, assassin (participle)(subst)
    1d) (Pual) to be killed
